label: About
title: About Pink Brine Evidence Lounge
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 21 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Foa Hoka - Fonogram.akt 2, by Foa Hoka and Thirteen Ways of Looking, by Chris Corsano & Bill Orcutt, plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Pink Brine Evidence Lounge: Create one dense finished still image: a smoky neon lounge tableau seen through translucent coral-pink acetate, with the whole scene flattened into ghosted vertical panels and soft overexposed layers. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against tall translucent coral acetate panel, broken chrome billiard arc, and round amber coaster/medallion.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
